sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: Option Care Health reporta receita de US$ 1,46-1,47 bilhões no 4º trimestre
feed.summary: Option Care Health (NASDAQ:OPCH) divulgou resultados financeiros preliminares não auditados para o quarto trimestre e ano completo de 2025, além de projeções para 2026. A empresa espera uma receita líquida no quarto trimestre entre US$ 1,46 bilhão e US$ 1,47 bilhão, e para o ano de 2025, entre US$ 5,645 bilhões e US$ 5,655 bilhões. A Option Care Health também anunciou uma expansão de seu programa de recompra de ações para US$ 1,0 bilhão e analistas indicam que a empresa pode estar ligeiramente subvalorizada.
feed.source: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos
feed.source_domain: Investing.com Brasil - Finanças, Câmbio e Investimentos

feed.title: Walmart drone delivery service to expand to 150 more stores across 4 cities
feed.summary: Walmart and Wing announced an expansion of their drone delivery service to 150 additional Walmart stores in four major cities, building on existing operations in Bentonville, Dallas, and Atlanta. This expansion aims to significantly increase Walmart's drone delivery network, with a goal of over 270 locations by 2027. The service, which provides quick delivery of everyday essentials, is being added to Los Angeles, St. Louis, Cincinnati, and Miami, among other locations.

feed.title: Will Apple (AAPL) Beat Estimates Again in Its Next Earnings Report?
feed.summary: Apple (AAPL) is expected to beat its next earnings estimates, continuing a trend of outperforming expectations. The company has a positive Zacks Earnings ESP of +0.41% and a Zacks Rank #3 (Hold), which historically leads to a positive surprise in nearly 70% of cases. Apple's last two quarterly reports showed an average surprise of 8.75%, with the next earnings report anticipated on January 29, 2026.

feed.title: Ford Motor (NYSE:F) Given New $12.80 Price Target at HSBC
feed.summary: HSBC has increased its price target for Ford Motor (NYSE:F) from $9.80 to $12.80, maintaining a "hold" rating, but this new target still suggests an 8.41% potential downside from the stock's previous close. Despite varied analyst opinions with a consensus "Hold" rating and an average price target of $12.55, Ford recently beat its Q3 earnings estimates. The company also shows positive sentiment from Zacks regarding strong earnings-surprise history, inclusion in a top income stocks list, and CEO praise from Jim Cramer, alongside significant institutional investment activity.

feed.title: Gordon Reid's Top Picks: Meta, Morgan Stanley & RTX Corp
feed.summary: This article highlights Gordon Reid's top stock picks: Meta, Morgan Stanley, and RTX Corp. It also features Darren Sissons, partner and portfolio manager at Campbell, Lee & Ross Investment Management, who shares his own stock picks and market outlooks. The content includes a series of videos from other financial experts discussing their top picks and market insights from the past few days.

feed.title: Zimmer Biomet down after cautious remarks on outlook (ZBH:NYSE)
feed.summary: Zimmer Biomet Holdings (ZBH) shares fell to a session low after the company expressed caution regarding its outlook during its presentation at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference. The orthopedic device maker's remarks led to a negative market reaction.

feed.title: Boeing turnaround takes hold with highest annual jet deliveries since 2018
feed.summary: Boeing achieved its highest annual jet deliveries since 2018 and surpassed Airbus in net orders for the first time in seven years, indicating a significant turnaround after a series of crises. The company delivered 600 aircraft in 2025 and booked 1,075 net new orders, showing strong demand for its 737 MAX and 787 Dreamliner jets. Analysts believe Boeing's strong order book signals confidence from airlines and predict continued improvement in 2026.

feed.title: BD expansion could mean 100+ jobs in Columbus
feed.summary: BD (Becton, Dickinson and Company), a pharmaceutical manufacturer based in Columbus, Nebraska, is investing $110 million into a major expansion of its Columbus facility. This expansion aims to increase the production of pre-fillable syringes and is expected to create approximately 120 new jobs by mid-year. The company had previously invested $35 million into the same facility to produce more pre-filled flush syringes, which also added around 50 new jobs.

feed.title: Adobe stock hits 52-week low at $311.55 By Investing.com
feed.summary: Adobe Systems Incorporated stock has fallen to a new 52-week low of $311.55, marking a 24.42% decline over the past year due to market challenges and investor concerns. The company has faced multiple analyst downgrades from firms like Goldman Sachs, BMO Capital, Jefferies, and KeyBanc, citing competitive pressures, AI-enhanced alternatives, and P/E multiple discounts. Despite strong fourth-quarter performance, these downgrades highlight the challenging landscape for Adobe amidst evolving market dynamics.

feed.title: The Analyst Verdict: Live Nation Entertainment In The Eyes Of 12 Experts
feed.summary: Twelve analysts have recently provided their insights on Live Nation Entertainment (NYSE: LYV), with a mix of bullish to bearish sentiments. The average 12-month price target is $172.42, a 2.74% decrease from the previous average. The article details individual analyst actions, ratings, and price targets, alongside a financial overview of Live Nation Entertainment, highlighting its revenue growth, net margin, return on equity, and debt management.

feed.title: JPM26: Boston Scientific strengthens urology portfolio with Valencia Technologies acquisition
feed.summary: Boston Scientific has acquired Valencia Technologies to enhance its urology and pelvic health portfolio with an implantable tibial nerve stimulation (ITNS) treatment, specifically Valencia's eCoin device for urge urinary incontinence. This acquisition builds on Boston Scientific's previous strategy of bolstering its neuromodulation offerings, including the 2024 acquisition of Axonics. The deal positions Boston Scientific to compete with Medtronic in the UUI treatment market and contributes to its broader strategy in neurological devices, with the global neurology devices market projected to exceed $25 billion by 2034.

feed.title: Chipotle lovers: How to score free chicken, steak, carnitas today only
feed.summary: Chipotle is offering its Rewards members a special one-day deal on January 13, 2026, where they can get a free extra serving of protein (chicken, steak, carnitas, etc.) with online orders. To redeem the offer, members must use the promo code PROTEIN when ordering a burrito, bowl, or salad with double protein through the Chipotle app or website. This promotion comes as many people focus on health and fitness goals at the start of the new year and applies to items on Chipotle's recently launched High Protein Menu.

feed.title: Bruker (BRKR) Projects Modest Revenue Growth and EPS Increase fo
feed.summary: Bruker (BRKR) has projected modest organic revenue growth and significant improvements in operating margins and EPS for 2026. The company, which operates in the medical devices and instruments industry, anticipates a double-digit boost in non-GAAP earnings per share. Despite a solid 3-year revenue growth rate, Bruker faces challenges in profitability and efficiency, as indicated by a negative net margin and a high RSI suggesting overbought conditions.

feed.title: HII Successfully Demonstrates Sea Launcher, Ship-Based Automated Launch and Recovery of REMUS Autonomous Underwater Vehicle
feed.summary: HII successfully demonstrated its Sea Launcher system for the automated launch and recovery of REMUS autonomous underwater vehicles (UUVs). This advancement reduces risk to sailors, expands mission capabilities, and shortens timelines, particularly in challenging environments. The technology integrates seamlessly with manned or unmanned vessels and reinforces REMUS's value in distributed maritime operations for navies worldwide.

feed.title: Insulet Stock Is Going Off: Game-Changer For Diabetes Tech Or Just Hype?
feed.summary: This article examines Insulet, the company behind the Omnipod insulin pump, and its stock prospects. It discusses whether Insulet is a game-changer in diabetes tech or if its stock is overhyped, analyzing the product's benefits, the business model's strengths, and the risks involved. The piece also compares Insulet with competitors and provides a verdict for potential investors.

feed.title: Here’s What to Expect From Intercontinental Exchange's Next Earnings Report
feed.summary: Intercontinental Exchange (ICE) is set to release its Q4 2025 earnings report, with analysts projecting an EPS of $1.68, a 10.5% increase year-over-year. The company has a strong track record of beating earnings estimates and is expected to see continued EPS growth in fiscal years 2025 and 2026. Despite a slight revenue miss in Q3 2025, analysts maintain a "Strong Buy" rating for ICE, anticipating a 15.2% upside potential from its current stock price.

feed.title: Airbnb Inc (NASDAQ:ABNB) Upgraded By Analysts
feed.summary: Several analysts have upgraded Airbnb (NASDAQ: ABNB) citing attractive valuation, potential for sustained growth, and reduced downside risks. Wells Fargo, Barclays, and B.Riley all raised their ratings and price targets, highlighting opportunities in hotel supply, sponsored listings, and the "reserve now pay later" feature. The company's upbeat revenue forecasts and strong bookings in various markets further support these positive outlooks.

feed.title: C.H. Robinson Worldwide: Can a 120-Year-Old Freight Broker Win the AI Logistics Wars?
feed.summary: C.H. Robinson Worldwide is transforming itself into an AI-powered logistics platform to stay competitive in the evolving freight market. The company is leveraging its Navisphere platform, data, and AI to offer unified, multimodal operations, predictive analytics, and end-to-end visibility. This strategy aims to create a durable competitive edge against newer digital challengers like Uber Freight and Flexport by combining scale and technological sophistication with human service.

feed.title: Teradyne stock reaches all-time high at 229.87 USD
feed.summary: Teradyne Inc. (TER) stock has reached an all-time high of $229.87, trading just above its 52-week high, despite InvestingPro's fair value assessment indicating it might be overvalued. This surge reflects strong market confidence, with the company showing significant gains over the past year and six months, supported by a "GOOD" financial health rating and upward earnings revisions from analysts. The company's growth is further fueled by increased demand for AI-related technologies, strategic expansions, and a declared cash dividend, positioning it strongly in the technology and robotics sectors.

feed.title: Boeing Reports Q4 Deliveries as New Orders Add to Backlog
feed.summary: Boeing announced its Q4 2025 delivery figures, totaling 160 commercial aircraft and 37 Defense, Space & Security programs, contributing to 600 commercial deliveries for the full year 2025. This announcement follows significant new orders, including Delta Air Lines' first direct order for up to 60 787 Dreamliners and Aviation Capital Group's order for 50 737 MAX airplanes. These new orders further expand Boeing's existing backlog.

feed.title: Williams-Sonoma to close last San Francisco store in Union Square
feed.summary: Williams-Sonoma is closing its last San Francisco store in Union Square, a four-story location that opened in 1993, following a series of lease extensions. The space will reportedly become a flagship store for luxury fashion house Chanel, which purchased the building in 2022. This closure highlights the ongoing retail shakeup in Union Square, despite some luxury brands maintaining their presence.

feed.title: Delivery giants face share loss, Amazon threat, leading BNP Paribas to downgrade FedEx and UPS (FDX)
feed.summary: BNP Paribas has downgraded FedEx and UPS, citing concerns over market share loss and increased competition from Amazon. The investment bank believes the delivery giants' growth potential is undermined as Amazon expands its logistics capabilities and captures more package volume.

feed.title: Barclays Bank PLC
feed.summary: Barclays Bank PLC has issued $4,333,000 in Market Linked Securities—Auto-Callable with Contingent Coupon and Contingent Downside Principal at Risk Securities due January 12, 2029. These securities are linked to the lowest performing common stock of The Boeing Company, Kratos Defense & Security Solutions, Inc., Lockheed Martin Corporation, and Northrop Grumman Corporation, offering a contingent coupon rate of 18.40% per annum if certain conditions are met, but carry the risk of significant principal loss if the underlying stocks perform poorly. Investors should be aware that payments are subject to Barclays' creditworthiness and that the securities may be automatically called prior to maturity.

feed.title: AMETEK Inc.: Quiet Climb, Firm Fundamentals – Has This Industrial Tech Stock Earned Its Premium?
feed.summary: AMETEK Inc. has seen a quiet but steady rise in its stock price, driven by strong fundamentals like resilient margins, disciplined capital allocation, and strategic niche acquisitions. Despite Wall Street's focus on flashier tech, analysts largely recommend buying AMETEK, citing its high-margin profile and exposure to growing industrial technology sectors. The company's future performance hinges on global industrial and aerospace demand, its acquisition pipeline, margin durability, and capital allocation strategy.

feed.title: Boston Scientific strengthens urology portfolio with Valencia Technologies acquisition
feed.summary: Boston Scientific has acquired Valencia Technologies to enhance its urology and pelvic health offerings, specifically with Valencia's eCoin implantable tibial nerve stimulation (ITNS) system for urge urinary incontinence (UUI). This acquisition puts Boston Scientific in direct competition with Medtronic's Altaviva device and is part of Boston's broader strategy to expand its neuromodulation treatment portfolio, following its 2024 acquisition of Axonics. The deal is expected to conclude in the first half of 2026, further solidifying Boston Scientific's position in the high-growth neurology devices market.

feed.title: Morgan Stanley Raises Price Target for TTWO to $280, Maintains Overweight Rating | TTWO Stock News GuruFocus News
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Brian Nowak has maintained an "Overweight" rating for Take-Two Interactive (TTWO) and raised the price target from $275.00 to $280.00 USD. This adjustment indicates a 1.82% increase in the target price for the video game developer and publisher. The article also provides a summary of other recent analyst ratings and price targets for TTWO, as well as an overview of the company's business, including its popular franchises like Grand Theft Auto and NBA 2K.

feed.title: Chipotle distances itself from Bill Ackman after ICE donation sparks boycott calls
feed.summary: Chipotle publicly distanced itself from billionaire hedge fund manager Bill Ackman after he donated $10,000 to a fundraiser for an ICE agent involved in a fatal shooting, sparking online boycott calls against the fast-casual chain. Although Ackman's firm, Pershing Square, was a major investor in Chipotle and instrumental in its turnaround, he fully exited his stake in late 2025. Chipotle's statement clarified that Ackman is not affiliated with the company.

feed.title: FedEx Corp (NYSE:FDX) Mixed View
feed.summary: FedEx (NYSE: FDX) is experiencing a mixed investment outlook. BofA upgraded the company to Buy with a $365 price target, citing potential benefits from cost reductions, network consolidation, and an expected freight market recovery. Conversely, BNP Paribas Exane downgraded FedEx to Neutral despite strong recent performance, raising concerns about increasing competition from players like Amazon.

feed.title: Autodesk Inc (NASDAQ:ADSK) Gets Buy Rating
feed.summary: Rothschild & Co Redburn initiated coverage of Autodesk Inc. (NASDAQ:ADSK) with a Buy rating and a $375 price target, forecasting strong growth in its design and construction software segments. Piper Sandler also reiterated an Overweight rating and named ADSK a "Top Pick for 2026," citing the company's progress in Generative AI and robust financial performance. Both firms highlight Autodesk's market leadership, pricing power, and potential for continued expansion.

feed.title: Amgen Growth Story Isn't Tapped Out Yet, Says Goldman
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has reiterated a Buy rating and a $403 price target for Amgen (NASDAQ: AMGN), citing continued upside to its earnings estimates for fiscal 2026 and beyond. Analyst Salveen Richter noted strong momentum across Amgen's key growth assets and therapeutic areas, particularly highlighting the commercial potential of Maritide in obesity maintenance and Type 2 diabetes, and confidence in olpasiran as a best-in-class asset for cardiovascular health.

feed.title: ChemSec issues low grades to US chemical manufacturers
feed.summary: ChemSec's latest annual ChemScore report gave U.S. chemical manufacturers low grades for their management of sustainable substances, with Minnesota-based Ecolab scoring the highest among U.S. companies and Chemours placing last. The nonprofit updated its scoring methodology to better differentiate companies based on transparency, phase-out of persistent chemicals, product portfolio, and safer solutions. Ecolab earned praise for its commitment to phase out PFAS by the end of 2026, while Chemours received zero points, with ChemSec calling it "in danger of becoming a stranded asset."

feed.title: Regions insider named next CFO
feed.summary: Anil Chadha, Regions Financial Corp.'s current controller and head of corporate finance, will succeed David Turner as CFO in March after Turner's retirement. Turner served the company for 20 years, with 16 as CFO, and is credited with guiding the bank through challenging periods with a focus on capital allocation and risk management. Chadha, who joined Regions in 2011, brings extensive experience in financial reporting, planning, and risk systems and is considered "very well-suited" for the role by analysts.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts CenterPoint Energy Price Target to $42 From $41, Maintains Neutral Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has increased its price target for CenterPoint Energy (CNP) from $41 to $42, while maintaining a Neutral rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects a modest recalibration of expectations for the multiline utility company. The article also notes recent analyst recommendations and company news, including other price target changes and an upgrade for CenterPoint Energy.

feed.title: Tractor Supply Opens 2,400th Store as Part of a 100-Unit Expansion Plan
feed.summary: Tractor Supply has opened its 2,400th store in Aiken, South Carolina, marking a significant milestone in its rapid expansion. This new location is one of four stores opened in the first two weeks of 2026, contributing to the company's plan to launch 100 new stores by year-end. The company emphasizes its community-focused mission and excitement for serving residents in areas with "Life Out Here" values.

feed.title: Site Work Underway on New Sherwin-Williams Store in WLR
feed.summary: Site preparation has begun for a new Sherwin-Williams paint store in west Little Rock, located on St. Vincent Way off Chenal Parkway. Connell Construction of Searcy is handling the site work, with the project expected to be completed later this year. This new location will add to Sherwin-Williams' existing presence across Arkansas.

feed.title: What Happens When Apple Turns to Google for AI Technology? We’re About to Find Out
feed.summary: Apple has announced a partnership with Google to power the next generation of its AI models, specifically for the Apple Intelligence suite and a revamped Siri. The new AI models, based on Google's Gemini, will run on Apple devices and servers and are expected to significantly upgrade Siri's conversational abilities and functions, including answering factual questions, providing emotional support, and generating documents. This collaboration follows Apple's extensive search for an AI partner after its own AI capabilities were deemed a disappointment.

feed.title: Moderna, Kosmos Energy, Option Care Health, Kennametal And Other Big Stocks Moving Higher On Tuesday
feed.summary: Several major stocks, including Moderna, Kosmos Energy, Option Care Health, and Kennametal, experienced significant gains on Tuesday. Moderna saw a sharp rise after providing positive updates on its business and pipeline at the J.P. Morgan Healthcare Conference, alongside other companies like TryHard Holdings and Kosmos Energy announcing strategic initiatives. Analyst upgrades also contributed to the upward movement of stocks like Kennametal, Intel, and Advanced Micro Devices.

feed.title: Manufacturer Saves Untold Hours with Enhanced Time Tracking Solution
feed.summary: A manufacturing and architectural design firm significantly improved its operations by implementing Centrally HR, an enhanced time tracking solution. This led to a 50% reduction in payroll processing time, improved accuracy in timekeeping and scheduling, and increased employee engagement through self-service tools. The integration also eliminated manual time entry and provided real-time labor data for better decision-making.

feed.title: CRTO: Analyst Lowers Price Target to $34 Amid Equal-Weight Ratin
feed.summary: Morgan Stanley analyst Brian Nowak has lowered the price target for Criteo (CRTO) to $34 from $36, while maintaining an Equal-Weight rating. This adjustment reflects a continuous evaluation of the company's market position amidst other analyst revisions. Despite the lowered target, the average analyst price target for CRTO is $35.92, suggesting a potential upside of 73.26% from its current price, with a consensus "Outperform" status from brokerage firms.

feed.title: Bank of Montreal: Looking Well-Placed Headed Into 2026 (NYSE:BMO)
feed.summary: Bank of Montreal delivered strong earnings growth in fiscal 2025, primarily driven by its Wealth Management, Capital Markets, and U.S. Banking segments. While its Canadian P&C segment faced credit charge increases, stabilization is expected in 2026, alongside continued momentum in U.S. Banking, supporting future earnings. The bank's robust balance sheet and sufficient capital allow for supplemental share repurchases, and despite a strong stock run, it trades at 1.67x book value with a 3.6% dividend yield.

feed.title: Stock Market Live January 13: S&P 500 (VOO) Rises on Tame Inflation Data
feed.summary: The S&P 500 (VOO) is rising due to tame inflation data, with December's CPI increasing only 2.7% year-over-year, less than expected. This opens the door for the Federal Reserve to potentially lower interest rates twice in 2026. KeyBanc upgrades Intel (INTC) and AMD (AMD) stocks, projecting significant growth for both, especially in their data center and AI segments.

feed.title: Revvity expects to report Q4 revenue of $772 million
feed.summary: Revvity is projected to report fourth-quarter revenue of $772 million. This announcement comes ahead of their Q4 earnings report. The expected revenue figure provides an initial glimpse into the company's financial performance for the quarter.

feed.title: Can Trump make single-family homes affordable by banning big investors?
feed.summary: Donald Trump proposes banning Wall Street firms from buying single-family homes to address housing affordability, aligning with some Democrats' criticisms of corporate homebuying. While supporters argue large investors drive up prices and make homeownership elusive, critics contend that banning such investors won't solve the core issue of housing supply shortages and may hinder investment. The proposed ban, intended to be forward-looking, aims to exclude institutional investors while protecting "mom-and-pop" landlords.

feed.title: Apple Partners With Google's Gemini to Power AI Version of Siri
feed.summary: Apple Inc. is reportedly partnering with Google, integrating Google's Gemini AI models to power a new AI-driven version of Siri. This multiyear deal is a significant move for Apple into the competitive AI space, with reports suggesting Apple could pay Google around $1 billion annually for the technology. The updated Siri, leveraging both Gemini and Apple's own Foundation Models, is expected to launch later this year.

feed.title: Ross Stores Inc stock hits all-time high of 193.19 USD
feed.summary: Ross Stores Inc. (ROST) has reached an all-time high stock price of $193.19, surpassing its previous 52-week high, with significant gains over the past year and six months. Despite trading at a relatively high P/E ratio, the company has maintained strong financial health and investor optimism, supported by robust third-quarter earnings and strategic initiatives. Analysts have raised price targets, though some suggest the stock may be overvalued compared to its Fair Value.

feed.title: U.S. Bank to buy BTIG for $1B to bolster capital-markets business
feed.summary: U.S. Bank announced its acquisition of financial services firm BTIG for up to $1 billion, aiming to strengthen its capital markets business. The deal, expected to close by Q2 2026, comprises $725 million in cash and stock, plus $275 million contingent on performance targets. This acquisition builds on an existing referral partnership between the two companies and is intended to fill product gaps for U.S. Bank's clients while providing BTIG clients access to a broader financial platform.

feed.title: Mubadala-Backed CI Buys Invesco’s Canadian Fund Assets
feed.summary: CI Global Asset Management, backed by Mubadala, is acquiring Invesco Ltd.'s C$26 billion Canadian investment fund business. This acquisition will make CI the manager of 100 Invesco mutual funds and ETFs, increasing its total assets to C$170 billion. The move continues a trend of mergers and acquisitions in Canada's mutual fund industry.

feed.title: Ross Stores Inc stock hits all-time high of 193.19 USD
feed.summary: Ross Stores Inc. (ROST) stock has reached an all-time high of $193.19, surpassing its previous 52-week high, marking a significant increase of 29.32% over the past year and 47.3% in the last six months. This strong performance, despite a challenging economic environment, is supported by a "GREAT" financial health score from InvestingPro and higher-than-expected third-quarter earnings. Analysts have raised price targets for the company, maintaining a Buy rating, while acknowledging potential overvaluation based on its P/E ratio.

feed.title: Tyler Technologies Becomes Sole Payment Processing Partner for Chesterfield County, Virginia
feed.summary: Tyler Technologies has partnered with Chesterfield County, Virginia, to become its sole payment processing provider, unifying all county payments under one solution. The agreement will streamline the payment experience for nearly 400,000 residents through an improved payer portal and provide better financial reporting for the county staff. Tyler's integrated software will manage all online and in-person payments across various departments, including tax, utility, fire, and EMS services.

feed.title: MGM Stock Downgraded on Lingering Las Vegas Casino Issues
feed.summary: MGM Resorts International's stock has been downgraded to "hold" from "buy" by Truist Securities analyst Barry Jonas due to ongoing Las Vegas Strip challenges, specifically weak leisure demand. Jonas predicts a 9% year-over-year drop in Q4 EBITDAR and a 1% decline for 2026, emphasizing the need for MGM to enhance its customer value proposition, especially at mid-tier properties. The report also touches on potential M&A activities, particularly MGM increasing its stake in BetMGM.
